description_wiki: Iraq, officially the Republic of Iraq, is a country in West Asia.

aliases: Chaldean Catholic Church of the Chaldean Tradition
description: Eastern Syriac particular church of the Catholic Church
description_wiki: The Chaldean Catholic Church (Classical Syriac: ܥܕܬܐ ܟܠܕܝܬܐ ܩܬܘܠܝܩܝܬܐ, ʿĒdtā Kalḏāytā Qāṯōlīqāytā; الكنيسة الكلدانية, al-Kanīsa al-Kaldāniyya; Latin: Ecclesia Chaldaeorum Catholica) is an Eastern Catholic particular church (sui iuris) in full communion with the Holy See and the worldwide Catholic Church.

surface_forms: the war between Iran and Iraq
description_wiki: The Iran–Iraq War began with the Iraqi invasion of Iran in September 1980.

A Department of Human Services (DHS) or Ministry of Human Services (MHS) is a national or subnational umbrella agency which is responsible for providing public assistance programs to the population they serve.
Greece, officially the Hellenic Republic, is a country in Southeast Europe.

entity: United Nations High Commissioner for Refugees
aliases: Office of the United Nations High Commissioner for Refugees (UNHCR)
description: United Nations agency mandated to protect and support refugees
description_wiki: The Office of the United Nations High Commissioner for Refugees (UNHCR) is a United Nations agency mandated to aid and protect refugees, forcibly displaced communities, and stateless people, and to assist in their voluntary repatriation, local integration or resettlement to a third country.

entity: International Red Cross and Red Crescent Movement
description_wiki: The International Red Cross and Red Crescent Movement is a humanitarian movement with approximately 16 million volunteers, members, and staff worldwide.

description: country located primarily in North America
description_wiki: The United States of America (USA), also known as the United States (U.S.) or America, is a country primarily located in North America.

description: president of the United States from 1981 to 1989 and actor (1911–2004)
description_wiki: Ronald Wilson Reagan (February 6, 1911 – June 5, 2004) was an American politician and actor who served as the 40th president of the United States from 1981 to 1989.

entity: English as a second or foreign language
aliases: English for speakers of other languages
description: use of English by speakers with different native languages
description_wiki: English as a second or foreign language refers to the use of English by individuals whose native language is different, commonly among students learning to speak and write English.

description: public school system of Detroit, Michigan
description_wiki: Detroit Public Schools Community District (DPSCD) is a public school district that serves Detroit, Michigan, and high school students in Highland Park, Michigan.

description: American public research university located in Detroit, Michigan
description_wiki: Wayne State University (WSU) is a public research university in Detroit, Michigan, United States.

description: right to communicate one's opinions and ideas and right to speak
description_wiki: Freedom of speech is a principle that supports the freedom of an individual or a community to articulate their opinions and ideas without fear of retaliation, censorship, or legal sanction.

description: annual anti-abortion rally in Washington, D.C.
description_wiki: The March for Life is an annual rally and march against the practice and legality of abortion, held in the District of Columbia, the capital city of the United States, either on or around the anniversary of Roe v.

entity: Islamic State of Iraq and the Levant
aliases: Islamic State in Iraq and Syria
Islamic State of Iraq and Levant
Islamic State of Iraq and Syria
Islamic State of Iraq and al-Sham
description: Salafi jihadist militant Sunni Islamist group
country in West Asia and Southeast Europe
description_wiki: Turkey, officially the Republic of Türkiye, is a country mainly located in Anatolia in West Asia, with a smaller part called East Thrace in Southeast Europe.
